name: Seven-Layer Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the cabbage fine in a food processor; you should have 3-4 cups.
2. Coarsely chop the cauliflower in the food processor.
3. In a medium heavy frying pan, toast the pecans in the butter over medium heat until browned, about 10 minutes. Remove from heat and cool.
4. In a straight-sided glass bowl, layer as follows: chopped cabbage, chopped cauliflower, half the toasted pecans, peas, mushrooms, onions, cheese, coleslaw dressing, and the remaining pecans. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
